summary: v49.0.0 FULL SOFTWARE VERIFICATION COMPLETE. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified. Custom Branding, FY/KMS selectors, Opening Stock, Stock Summary with Opening column, Payment Service - all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/branding returns custom_fields array with label, value, position
VERIFIED: GET /api/fy-settings returns both active_fy (KMS) and financial_year (FY)
VERIFIED: GET /api/opening-stock returns all 9 stock items (paddy, rice_usna, rice_raw, bran, kunda, broken, kanki, husk, frk)
VERIFIED: GET /api/stock-summary includes 'opening' field for all items
VERIFIED: Available = Opening + In - Out formula correct for all stock items
VERIFIED: POST /api/private-payments creates payment + cashbook + ledger entries via payment_service.py
VERIFIED: stock_calculator.py centralized functions used by stock-summary and paddy-stock endpoints
VERIFIED: payment_service.py centralized functions used by private-payments endpoint
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing opening stock from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: v49.0.0 release verified. All features working: Custom Branding Fields with position (left/center/right), FY (Apr-Mar) + KMS (Oct-Sep) dual selectors in header, Opening Stock with 9 items and carry-forward, Stock Summary with Opening column showing amber values, Payment service refactoring complete. Opening stock for KMS 2025-2026: Paddy=500, Rice(Usna)=300 (carried from 2024-2025).

login.details: Admin login with admin/admin123 works correctly

branding_custom_fields.details: GET /api/branding returns custom_fields array with GSTIN and Mobile fields, position validation works

fy_settings.details: GET /api/fy-settings returns both active_fy (KMS) and financial_year (FY)

opening_stock.details: GET /api/opening-stock returns all 9 stock items, PUT requires admin role

carry_forward.details: POST /api/opening-stock/carry-forward requires admin role, calculates closing and sets as opening

stock_summary.details: GET /api/stock-summary includes 'opening' field, Available = Opening + In - Out formula verified

paddy_stock.details: GET /api/paddy-stock returns cmr_paddy_in, pvt_paddy_in, total_paddy_used, available_paddy

cash_book.details: GET /api/cash-book returns entries, POST /api/cash-book/auto-fix runs 9-step integrity check

private_payments.details: POST creates payment + cashbook + ledger entries, DELETE reverses correctly

stock_calculator_refactoring.details: Centralized stock calculation functions in stock_calculator.py used by endpoints

payment_service_refactoring.details: Centralized payment functions in payment_service.py used by private-payments endpoint

frontend_verification.login_page: PASS - Login form visible with username/password fields
frontend_verification.whats_new_dialog: PASS - Shows v49.0.0 changelog, closes correctly
frontend_verification.header_kms_selector: PASS - Shows KMS 2024-2025 in amber color
frontend_verification.header_fy_selector: PASS - Shows FY 2024-2025 in emerald color
frontend_verification.custom_branding_section: PASS - Extra Fields section with GSTIN and Mobile fields
frontend_verification.position_selector: PASS - Left/Center/Right position dropdown for each field
frontend_verification.opening_stock_section: PASS - Shows all 9 stock items with input fields
frontend_verification.save_opening_stock_button: PASS - Save Opening Stock button visible
frontend_verification.opening_column: PASS - Opening column visible in Stock Summary table
frontend_verification.paddy_opening_500: PASS - Paddy shows 500 Qntl opening stock
frontend_verification.rice_usna_opening_300: PASS - Rice (Usna) shows 300 Qntl opening stock
frontend_verification.amber_opening_values: PASS - 24 amber elements found (opening stock values)
